prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约47432名、48655名、19594名、59192名、45161名。2023年因仅含本科一批A段数据（不含B段特殊类型）导致位次异常偏低，2024年因新高考改革首年出现大幅波动，2025年回升至45161名，近两年呈波动中趋稳态势；该校在吉林省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年53人、2022年52人、2023年220人（含大类合并）、2024年48人、2025年49人；2026年计划52人，较2025年扩招3人（+6.12%），扩招幅度有限，对竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大学为211工程、国家双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜2026年排名第120位，近年排名稳定在116–122之间，属于中游偏上211院校；该校近年未出现明显负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第95位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量处于中等偏低水平，未出现投档线断档或爆冷记录，报考关注度平稳；第五轮学科评估中食品科学与工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工程类直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、计算机类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，但该校以农林为特色，相关农林类专业（植物生产类、动物生产类等）社会热度偏冷；吉林省2026年高考总考生约110868人，较2025年减少约624人（-0.56%），物理类考生估算约79969人，竞争略有缓解；2026年；东北农业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，在吉林省招生占比约1%（2025年60人/全国5575人），属外省招生；吉林省考生对哈尔滨高校的地域接受度较高，无明显地域偏好障碍。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次45161名、2026年扩招6.12%、吉林省考生总数小幅减少、学校声誉平稳等因素，预计2026年理科（物理类）最低录取位次在46820名基础上小幅上移，最终预测位次约47120名，区间46620–47620名。扩招与考生减少共同推动位次数字增大（竞争略缓），但扩招幅度有限，位次上移空间不大。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 47432, 48655, 19594, 59192, and 45161 respectively. In 2023, due to data only including the first batch of undergraduate A section (excluding B section special types), the ranking was abnormally low. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, there was significant fluctuation. In 2025, it rebounded to 45161, showing a trend of stabilization amid fluctuations in recent years. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jilin Province: 53 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 220 in 2023 (including major mergers), 48 in 2024, 49 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 52, an increase of 3 (+6.12%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion, slightly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 120th on the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings between 116 and 122 in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The university has not experienced significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 95th (rated as 'average'), with moderately low short video exposure, no records of admission cutoff line drops or cold surprises, and stable application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering received an A- rating, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering category in enrollment majors, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science have consistently high social popularity, but the university is characterized by agriculture and forestry, with related majors (Plant Production, Animal Production, etc.) being relatively cold. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Jilin Province is approximately 110,868, a decrease of about 624 (-0.56%) compared to 2025, with an estimated 79,969 physics category examinees, slightly easing competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, with enrollment in Jilin Province accounting for about 1% (60 out of 5,575 nationwide in 2025), making it an out-of-province enrollment. Jilin Province examinees have a high acceptance of universities in Harbin, with no significant regional preference barriers.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 45161, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 6.12%, a slight decrease in the total number of examinees in Jilin Province, and stable university reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 will slightly increase from 46820, with a final predicted ranking of approximately 47120, ranging from 46620 to 47620. The expansion and decrease in examinees jointly push the ranking number upward (slightly easing competition), but the expansion is limited, leaving little room for ranking increase.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 47120, range 46620–47620. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (46620) can focus on Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Agronomy Top Talent Class, etc.); those in the middle of the range should primarily consider Tier 2 majors (Water Resources, Biological Sciences, etc.), while also considering less popular Tier 1 majors; candidates near the upper limit (47620) should use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Business Administration, Finance, etc.). The university's Food Science and Engineering is an A- discipline, and related majors are worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 2263, 2393, 2269, 2347, and 2894 respectively. Rankings were stable between 2263 and 2393 from 2021 to 2024, but significantly shifted back to 2894 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 631 positions over the past 5 years, showing a slow backward trend. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Jilin Province: 7 students in 2021, 8 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 12 in 2024, 11 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 10 students, a reduction of 1 student (-9.09%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively significant reduction and may intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 120th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings between 116 and 122 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The university has not experienced any significant negative public opinion incidents in recent years. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 95th (rated as 'average'), indicating stable application attention. There have been no records of cutoff score drops or cold surprises. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering received an A- rating, but the university's liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Business Administration, Finance, Russian) have low correlation with its advantageous disciplines, so the direct appeal of advantageous disciplines to liberal arts applicants is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity recommendation, Finance is divided and wait-and-see, Business Administration is clearly discouraged, and Russian and other foreign language majors are generally wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Jilin Province is about 110,868, with an estimated 30,899 history category examinees, a decrease of about 172 (-0.55%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, and enrolls a small number of liberal arts students in Jilin Province (11 in 2025), making it an out-of-province enrollment. Jilin Province examinees have a relatively high acceptance of universities in Harbin.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2894, a 9.09% enrollment reduction in 2026, a slight decrease in the total number of history category examinees in Jilin Province, and stable university reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for liberal arts (history category) in 2026 will slightly move forward from 2736, with a final predicted ranking of about 2686, and a range of 2186 to 3186. The enrollment reduction is the main factor driving the ranking number to decrease (intensifying competition), but the decrease in examinees has a slight offsetting effect, resulting in an overall slight forward shift in ranking.
